settings.text: Offer accurate real-time shipping rates and ship orders efficiently. Optimize every shipment with AI-powered 3D bin packing and multi-carrier integration.

settings.title: AI 3D Bin Packing
settings.text: Automatically fits order items into your boxes in 3D so you use the right size every time. Reduce dimensional weight costs and eliminate manual guesswork.

settings.title: Real-time Shipping Rates
settings.text: Show live rates from UPS, USPS, FedEx, and Australia Post directly at checkout and in your admin panel.

settings.title: Package Management
settings.text: Create and manage your custom box dimensions and weight limits for 100% rate accuracy on every order.

settings.title: Order Shipment Workflow
settings.text: Review orders, see packed boxes, and purchase shipping labels without ever leaving the DimenAI app interface.

settings.title: Multi-Carrier Real-time Rates
settings.text: Empower your customers with the most accurate shipping options. DimenAI fetches live data from UPS, USPS, FedEx, and Australia Post to ensure fair and transparent pricing at checkout.

settings.title: Intelligent 3D Bin Packing
settings.text: Save up to 30% on shipping by using the most efficient packaging. Our AI analyzes your order items and calculates the perfect fit for your boxes in real-time.

settings.title: Unified Carrier Management
settings.text: Securely integrate and manage all your carrier accounts in one place. Configure separate handling fees for products and carriers to fine-tune your margins.

settings.title: Ready to Transform Your Shipping?
settings.text: Join thousands of merchants using DimenAI to save time and money on every shipment. Start your journey today.
